ip_outcome_note: Confirmed via PokemonTCG.io swsh6-59 name field. National Pokedex no. 280. Hoenn Psychic/Fairy empathy-based starter-adjacent species.

trivia_bullets.text: Ralts is classified as the 'Feeling Pokemon.' Its design is built around the concept of empathy: the red horn-like structures on its head function as emotional antennae, sensing the moods of nearby humans and Pokemon. Its bowl-cut visor design is a common visual shorthand in anime and manga for shy or sensitive characters.

"If its horns capture the warm feelings of people or Pokemon, its body warms up slightly." The horns-as-empathy-receptors mechanic is carried forward through Kirlia and into Gardevoir, described as capable of sensing its Trainer's emotions from across the world.

Kirlia (Ralts's direct evolution) branches into two final forms: Gardevoir (any gender, level 30) and Gallade (male only, via Dawn Stone) — one of the few three-stage lines with a gender-conditional fork at the second stage. Gardevoir is Psychic/Fairy; Gallade is Psychic/Fighting.

The Ralts line is consistently cited among the most popular designs from Generation III (Ruby/Sapphire, 2002). Community polls place Gardevoir as one of the most recognizable Pokemon designs overall, a recognition that retroactively elevates Ralts and Kirlia's cultural footprint.
sources: PokéCommunity Forums: Favorite Gen 3 Pokemon threads
